catalog_content:
Item Name: 5 Pounds Krusteaz Homestyle Cornbread Mix Just Add Water Restaurant Quality
Bullet Point 1: Just Add Water – Simplify baking with this restaurant-quality cornbread mix—no need for eggs or milk, just water!
Bullet Point 2: Light, Moist, & Fluffy – Enjoy homemade-style cornbread with a perfect balance of sweetness and rich corn flavor.
Bullet Point 3: Versatile & Easy to Prepare – Ideal for skillets, muffins, cornbread dressing, hush puppies, and more—bakes in minutes!
Bullet Point 4: Bulk Size for Restaurants & Families – The 5-pound bag is great for restaurants, large gatherings, and meal prepping.
Bullet Point 5: Trusted Krusteaz Quality – Made with premium ingredients for consistent, delicious results every time.
Product Description: Bring the classic taste of homemade cornbread to your kitchen with Krusteaz Homestyle Cornbread Mix. This easy-to-use mix requires only water—no eggs or milk—making it a convenient option for busy kitchens. Enjoy soft, moist, and fluffy cornbread with a touch of sweetness, perfect as a side dish or base for creative recipes. Whether you're baking for a restaurant, large family dinner, or meal prep, this 5-pound bulk bag ensures you have enough to serve everyone. Ideal for cornbread muffins, skillet cornbread, hush puppies, or even cornbread stuffing, Krusteaz delivers consistent quality and authentic flavor every time. Bake with confidence and enjoy the delicious simplicity of Krusteaz Homestyle Cornbread Mix!
Value: 80.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium-quality cornbread mix positioned for restaurants and large households, with a 5-pound bulk size indicating value pricing. 'Restaurant Quality' and 'Professional' branding suggest a higher-tier product, though no organic or specialty certifications are visible. Packaging emphasizes convenience and versatility, justifying a mid-to-high price point compared to standard baking mixes.

No Added Sugar or Salt: Enjoy naturally delicious pancakes, muffins, waffles, and bread loaves without unnecessary additives. Low Glycemic Index: Crafted to support balanced blood sugar levels, perfect for those mindful of their glycemic intake. Versatile & Easy to Use: Whether you're making pancakes, muffins, waffles, or bread loaves, this mix delivers excellent taste and texture every time.
